name: Malicious DLL Loading via Dnscache or Netbt
description: Adversaries may load a malicious DLL by taking advantage of the Network Configuration Operators group to create or set registry keys, which could lead to executing commands as SYSTEM.

filterSets.name: Malicious DLL Loading via Dnscache or Netbt
Suspicious DLL Loading via Performance Counter Registry

author: Abdelrahman Esmail
